flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of the Sequoias rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of the Sequoias rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($606 → $774).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of the Sequoias fell 26% between 2007 and 2010 (27.2% → 20.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of the Sequoias fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (9.3% → 0.0%).
